description_long: This is a two-story urban house with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof, featuring a modern brick exterior. The front facade displays two large windows on the upper floor and a combination of a door and window on the lower floor, all framed in a minimalist style. The side and rear walls are mostly unbroken brick, with the rear facade incorporating a set of wide glass doors and additional windows for natural light. The interior layout is partially visible, showing partitioned rooms and several wooden doors. The house's design emphasizes clean lines, functional geometry, and a lack of decorative elements, typical of contemporary urban residential architecture. The structure appears robust, with brick as the dominant material and large window openings providing visual contrast.
description: A modern, two-story brick house with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist urban design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two upper windows, a lower window, and a main entry door with a modern design.
description_view_1: Side view with an unbroken brick wall and no visible windows or doors.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a wide glass door, two upper windows, and a smaller door to the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a continuous brick wall and no visible openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a modern flush door with glass panels, no porch or overhang, and a minimalist aesthetic.
